nasb.text: Of Joseph he said, “Blessed of the Lord  be his land, With the choice things of heaven, with the dew, And from the deep lying beneath,

esv.text: And of Joseph he said, “Blessed by the Lord be his land, with the choicest gifts of heaven above, and of the deep that crouches beneath,

cnv.text: 論到約瑟，他說： “願他的地蒙耶和華賜福， 得著從天上而來的上好甘露， 以及蘊藏在地裡的泉水；

ccb.text: 摩西祝福约瑟家族说： “愿他们的土地蒙耶和华赐福， 得天上的甘霖， 及地下的泉源；
